items.title: KL as extra surprise beyond entropy
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  P["true distribution P"] --> H["H(P): inherent uncertainty"]
  P --> CE["H(P,Q): surprise using Q"]
  CE --> KL["D_KL(P||Q) = H(P,Q) - H(P)"]
  Q["model distribution Q"] --> CE
items.caption: Cross-entropy decomposes into the entropy of P plus the KL penalty from approximating P with Q.

items.title: Asymmetry of argument order
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  f1["D_KL(P||Q): sample from P"] --> f2["average log p - log q"]
  r1["D_KL(Q||P): sample from Q"] --> r2["average log q - log p"]
  f2 --> diff["usually different values"]
  r2 --> diff
items.caption: Swapping P and Q changes which outcomes are weighted and usually changes the KL value.
